name: extraction_smoke_cases
description: Cross-section smoke set covering the main extraction failure modes without going deep into a single sub-problem.

cases.input:
User: My name is Alice, I work at Stripe, and I drink black coffee every day.
Assistant: Noted.

cases.description: English hypothetical should not be extracted
cases.input:
User: If I ever move to Tokyo, I might learn Japanese.
Assistant: That would be exciting.

User: 如果我以后去日本，可能会学日语。
Assistant: 听起来不错。

cases.description: assistant answer should be ignored when user asks a question
cases.input:
User: Do you think Python is easy to learn?
Assistant: Python is a great beginner language.
should_not_extract: Python is a great beginner language

cases.description: 中文时态切换应拆成两个事实
cases.input:
User: 我之前在网易做后端，现在在字节做AI。
Assistant: 明白。

cases.description: explicit user-relevant event should be compressed into normal memory text
cases.input:
User: I started learning guitar last month and practice every evening.
Assistant: Nice progress.

cases.description: temporary troubleshooting chatter should not create memory
cases.input:
User: I retried the command three times and got a timeout again.
Assistant: Try restarting the service.

User: Please keep your answers short.
Assistant: Sure.
User: Bullet points are best for me.
Assistant: Noted.

cases.description: English preference change should produce two temporal facts
cases.input:
User: I used to drink lattes, but now I only drink americanos.
Assistant: Understood.

User: 我叫张三，今年28岁，在网易工作，喜欢喝黑咖啡。
Assistant: 记住了。
